history.content:
<thought>
I am at (1,1) facing right. The cell directly ahead (1,2) is lava (L), so moving forward is unsafe. Turning left would make me face up toward a wall (0,1). Turning right will orient me downward toward an empty floor cell (2,1), which is safe to move into.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at (1,1) facing down. The cell directly ahead (2,1) is a floor (.), safe to step on. Moving there gets me closer to the goal at (3,3). From there, I can later turn left to face right and approach the goal while avoiding the lava cells.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (2,1) facing down. The cell directly ahead (3,1) is a floor (.), safe to step on. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal at (3,3) by moving to the same row.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (3,1) facing down. The cell directly ahead (4,1) is a wall, so I cannot move forward. The goal is at (3,3) to my right. I need to turn clockwise to face right, then move forward to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am currently facing left (<). The goal is two cells to the right (east), at (3,3). I need to change my orientation to right (>) to move towards it. Turning clockwise (TURN_RIGHT) once will make me face up (^), and then another turn will make me face right. I will start by turning right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am now facing up (^) at (3,1). The goal is at (3,3) to the right. I need to face right to move towards it. Turning clockwise (TURN_RIGHT) from up will orient me to the right (>). Then I can move forward.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right (>) with an empty cell directly ahead at (3,2). The goal is at (3,3). I can safely move forward one step to get closer.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am one step away from the goal, facing right. Moving forward will place me on the goal cell.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
